---
title: ""
pagetitle: "The Hamstrings — Atlanta Cover Band"
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    css: home-override.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <img src="images/eddies.jpg" class="hero-bg" alt="The Hamstrings">
  <div class="home-content">
    <h2>Upcoming Dates</h2>
    <p>Mar 15 — Wild Heaven, Toco Hills &nbsp;·&nbsp; Apr 25 — Blue Top, Chamblee &nbsp;·&nbsp; May 16 — Kirkwood Spring Fling</p>
    <div class="home-links">
      <a href="shows.html" class="hero-cta-outline">View Full Schedule</a>
      <a href="mailto:hamstringsatl@gmail.com" class="hero-cta-outline">Book Us for Your Next Event</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
